title: Much of the US will be an 'extreme heat belt' by the 2050s | The Straits Times
description: Researchers predict that by 2050, over 100 million Americans will live in an "extreme heat belt" where the heat index will exceed 52 degrees Celsius at least one day a year.    Read more at straitstimes.com.
bodyText: Sign up now: Get ST's newsletters delivered to your inbox Peak temperatures now on the hottest seven days per year will be reached 18 days a year in most localities. Published Aug 15, 2022, 12:27 PM
